summary: Added WARR-20260706-0001 to admit PLAN-20260706-0001 for implementation. The warrant authorizes only read-only context-manifest-connected L0 candidate diagnostics and explicitly does not admit provider prompt changes, context selection changes, or automatic L0 retrieval behavior.
